hint_issue_card_after_pay: Tap RECEIVE at least once. If not fully paid, fill the deferral note and you must have a positive received amount. On successful card issue, ledger entries are posted for recorded payments.
hint_stay_bill_after_pay: Same as key card: RECEIVE first; if not fully paid, note + positive received amount required.
stay_bill_footer: After a successful card issue, recorded RECEIVE lines hit the ledger. CHECK-IN posts any remaining balance and opens the room.
mw_qc_nav_toast: Room {rid} loaded — receive payment, issue card, then confirm check-in
label_deferral_remark: Deferral / AR note (required if not fully paid)
ph_deferral_remark: e.g. guest pays balance tomorrow; manager approved card first
msg_receive_zero_needs_remark: If not fully paid, fill the deferral note (≥4 chars) before recording a 0 RECEIVE line.
msg_cannot_clear_after_ledger: Ledger rows were posted from this session; payment lines cannot be cleared.
hk_warn_need_room_staff: Select a room and enter staff name.
energy_mode_inhouse: Estimate from in-house stay (fallback if none)
energy_parse_error: Invalid kWh value. Use digits; comma or dot for decimals.
energy_warn_need_room_staff: Select a room and enter staff / electrician id.
help_text: Select a room from the left board first, then complete check-in, checkout, housekeeping, and audit actions on the right.
restore_confirm: Restoring will overwrite current data. Continue?
rate_override_hint: Room charge differs from the system line for this tier. Enter a reason (≥4 chars) before issuing a key card or confirming check-in.

msg_rate_override_needs_reason: Please enter an override reason (at least 4 characters).

Confirm this order for room {}?

finance_quick_entry_subtitle: Posts to ledger immediately and notifies vendor
finance_hint_deposit_split: Deposit net flow: today {cur}{d_today:.2f} · month {cur}{d_month:.2f} (in cash pool, not in turnover cards)
finance_register_expense_sub: Posts to hashed ledger and shift reconciliation

settings_tg_test_fill: Enter Token and Chat ID first.
settings_glossary_sub: Override fixed terms for your property.
takeover_hub_sub: Wire data, locks, and card issuance into ShadowGuard — one-click when possible, step-by-step when not; less downtime.
takeover_hub_philosophy: We only read your legacy DB and vendor files; we never modify the old system. Paths and status are copy-paste friendly for remote support.
takeover_hub_order_hint: Front desk (encoder on this PC): (1) CardLock front-desk takeover (CardLock.mdb + USB + optional sniffer). Other legacy: one-click SQLite or 4-step wizard. CSV/.sgkey via data center.
takeover_hub_btn_usb_lock: (3) USB lock brand detect & key migration
takeover_hub_peace_line: If a step fails: Refresh, copy the status text below — no SQL knowledge required.
takeover_hub_status_ph: Click Refresh to read lock_brand, legacy_lock_keys, etc.
mw_tooltip_takeover_hub: Legacy takeover hub (USB lock / sniffer / migration)
settings_vendor_locked_hint: Vendor maintainers only — enter vendor service code to unlock.
settings_vendor_code_unset: Vendor passcode is not configured on this machine. Activate via vendor and set it first.
settings_launcher_room_types_hint: Manage room types, consumables template, price and deposit.
settings_launcher_shop_hint: Maintain front-desk store items (SKU, category, cost, price, stock).
settings_launcher_glossary_hint: Adjust UI terminology (room/guest/front desk wording) for this hotel.
settings_launcher_takeover_hint: All-in-one legacy takeover hub: locks, sniffer, data migration.
settings_launcher_lock_hint: USB lock migration wizard: scan, map lock numbers, reissue cards.
settings_launcher_sniffer_hint: Sniff legacy encoder signals to extract Mifare keys for takeover.
settings_launcher_debug_hint: Vendor debug & diagnostics panel: logs, schema, manual scripts.
settings_label_default_checkout_hour: Default checkout time on guest card
settings_label_allow_frontdesk_modify_ex: Allow front desk to edit card expiry manually
data_import.window_title: Data Management — CSV Import / Migration / Key Transfer
data_import.header_subtitle: Each tab tells you: what to prepare → which button to click → when it's done
data_import.err_sgbak_invalid: Invalid file format — not a valid .sgbak file.
data_import.err_sgkey_invalid: Invalid file format — not a valid .sgkey file.
data_import.err_no_keys: No exportable encryption keys found in the current system.
data_import.err_wrong_password: Password verification failed — cannot decrypt key file.
data_import.err_password_short: ⚠️ Password must be at least 8 characters!
data_import.err_csv_columns: CSV must contain columns: room_id, floor, room_type.
data_import.lbl_import_password: Enter the password used during export:
data_import.confirm_import_msg:
About to import data from: {path} Imported data will be merged into the current system, existing records will be skipped. It is recommended to backup the current database first.
Continue?
data_import.confirm_export_password_msg: Please confirm you have memorized this password. If lost and the old computer is unavailable, encryption keys will be permanently unrecoverable. Proceed with export?
data_import.import_keys_success_msg:
Successfully imported {count} encryption keys.

The lock system should now work correctly.
data_import.csv_result_summary:
{total} rows, {success} rooms imported
{skipped} existing rooms skipped.
data_import.csv_result_no_extra: ⚠️ No extra property columns recognized. Define custom properties in Room Management → Custom Fields first, then import.
data_import.csv_tab_desc: Batch import room data from CSV exported from legacy systems. CSV must include columns: room_id, floor, room_type. Existing room IDs are automatically skipped. 💡 Auto import custom properties: CSV columns matching defined custom properties (e.g. water meter, non-smoking, renovation year) are automatically saved per room.
data_import.migration_tab_desc:
Seamless migration when changing computers / reinstalling

• Export: Package all current data into a .sgbak file
• Import: On the target computer, select the .sgbak file to restore
• Supports selective restore: rooms only, orders only, etc.

Note: Encryption keys (lock keys, etc.) should be handled via the Key Transfer tab, as the new computer has a different MAC address and keys need re-encryption.
data_import.key_tab_desc:
Lock Encryption Key / License Key Transfer

• This system uses the computer's MAC address as an encryption fingerprint — copying the database to a new computer will invalidate encryption keys.
• On the old computer, export a .sgkey file with a password. On the new computer, import with the same password.
• IMPORTANT: Keep this password safe! If lost and the old computer is gone, keys are permanently unrecoverable!

Current machine code: {machine_code}
data_import.legacy_tab_desc:
🏴‍☠️ Force-migrate data from competitor legacy systems

• Zero-info, fully automatic: No database passwords, table schemas, or lock keys needed
• Disk scan: Automatically finds all database files (SQLite/Access/dBase/CSV)
• Password cracking: Auto-cracks various database password protections
• Smart mapping: Auto-identifies old system fields and maps to ShadowGuard
• Lock takeover: Supports MIFARE Classic key cracking with card data structure analysis

Professional-grade operation demonstrating superior technical capability.
batch_create.import_header_sub: Read room numbers and lock numbers from CardLock.mdb RoomInfo; does not guess or modify customer rules.
batch_create.import_chk_overwrite: Overwrite lock numbers for existing rooms
batch_create.import_no_mdb: Source: CardLock.mdb not found, please complete legacy system takeover first.
batch_create.import_no_selection_body: Please check the rooms to import.
batch_create.import_lock_dup_body: Duplicate lock number in legacy import list: {lock}
batch_create.import_success_body: Added {created}, updated {updated}, skipped {skipped} rooms; synced {ck_count} blank cards.
batch_create.create_header_sub: Generate room draft first; lock numbers can be filled manually or left empty. System will not auto-assign lock numbers.
batch_create.err_format_body: Start and end room numbers must be numeric.
batch_create.err_range_body: End room number cannot be less than start.
batch_create.err_lock_invalid_body: Lock number for room {room} must be 8 hex digits or empty.
batch_create.err_room_exists_body: Room {room} already exists, cannot create duplicate.
batch_create.save_success_body: Successfully added {count} rooms. Rooms without lock numbers need them before card issuance.
batch_create.single_header_sub: Lock number can be left empty; must be filled as 8 hex digits before card issuance.
batch_create.err_lock_body: Lock number must be 8 hex digits or empty.
